pageIntro: Hart County is located in northeast Georgia and is known for its strong community, scenic beauty, and access to Lake Hartwell. This page provides an overview of the county’s history, geography, government, and public services.

images.title: Lake Hartwell
images.caption: Hart County’s connection to Lake Hartwell supports recreation, tourism, and outdoor life.

images.alt: Downtown Hartwell streetscape and historic buildings
images.title: Hartwell
images.caption: The county seat serves as a center for government, business, and community events.

images.alt: Park and trail area in Hart County
images.title: Parks & Recreation
images.caption: Outdoor spaces contribute to the county’s quality of life for residents and visitors.

sections.title: History
sections.body: Hart County was created in 1853 and named in honor of Nancy Hart, a Revolutionary War heroine closely associated with Georgia history. Over time, the county developed as a rural agricultural community and later expanded with recreation, tourism, and regional commerce.

sections.title: Geography & Recreation
sections.body: Hart County features rolling hills, farmland, and shoreline along Lake Hartwell. Outdoor recreation plays an important role in the area, with boating, fishing, camping, and parks contributing to the county’s quality of life.

sections.title: Government Structure
sections.body: Hart County operates under a Board of Commissioners form of government. County leadership oversees administration, budgeting, infrastructure, planning, and the delivery of public services to residents and businesses.

sections.title: Community & Services
sections.body: The county provides services including public safety, road maintenance, planning and zoning, elections administration, tax services, parks and recreation, and other functions that support daily life in the community.

statsIntro: Key facts and general county information

stats.title: Major Employment Sectors
stats.value: Education, healthcare, manufacturing, public administration, and service industries

stats.title: Transportation
stats.value: State highways and regional access to the I-85 corridor
